message:
fix(fr-command): align BITCOUNT missing-key precedence + BITFIELD OVERFLOW wording (br-frankenredis-ugkf)

Upstream t_string.c::bitcountCommand short-circuits to Integer(0) when
the key doesn't exist — BEFORE argv-shape validation — so BITCOUNT
with too many args on a nonexistent key returns 0, not a syntax
error. Added a store.exists() guard + updated the two unit tests
(bitcount_three_arg_form_is_syntax_error,
bitcount_invalid_unit_is_syntax_error) to seed the key first so they
still cover the argv-shape path.

BITFIELD OVERFLOW invalid type: ours produced
"ERR Invalid OVERFLOW type (should be one of WRAP, SAT, FAIL)" —
upstream emits plain "ERR Invalid OVERFLOW type specified".

Updated core_bitmap.json fixture expectations for both cases. Live
oracle: core_bitmap now 110/110 (was 108/110).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -455,8 +455,8 @@
         "extra"
       ],
       "expect": {
-        "kind": "error",
-        "value": "ERR syntax error"
+        "kind": "integer",
+        "value": 0
       }
     },
     {
@@ -1062,7 +1062,7 @@
       ],
       "expect": {
         "kind": "error",
-        "value": "ERR Invalid OVERFLOW type (should be one of WRAP, SAT, FAIL)"
+        "value": "ERR Invalid OVERFLOW type specified"
       }
     },

@@ -1632,29 +1632,58 @@

-

       "name": "bitfield_ro_setup_field",
       "now_ms": 1000,

       "expect": {

-        "value": [{ "kind": "integer", "value": 0 }]

+        "GET",
+        "u8",
+        "0"
+      ],
       "expect": {

-        "value": [{ "kind": "integer", "value": 42 }]

+        "SET",
+        "u8",

+        "99"

       "expect": {
         "kind": "error",
         "value": "ERR BITFIELD_RO only supports the GET subcommand"
@@ -1663,7 +1692,14 @@
     {
       "name": "bitfield_ro_rejects_incrby",
       "now_ms": 1003,
-      "argv": ["BITFIELD_RO", "bfro_key", "INCRBY", "u8", "0", "1"],

+        "bfro_key",

       "expect": {

         "value": "ERR BITFIELD_RO only supports the GET subcommand"
@@ -1672,49 +1708,110 @@
     {
       "name": "bitfield_ro_multiple_gets",
       "now_ms": 1004,
-      "argv": ["BITFIELD", "bfro_key", "SET", "u8", "8", "99"],
+      "argv": [

+        "bfro_key",
+        "SET",
+        "u8",
+        "8",
+        "99"

       "expect": {
         "kind": "array",
-        "value": [{ "kind": "integer", "value": 0 }]

       }

+      "argv": [

         "kind": "array",

+            "value": 42

+          {

         ]

     },

       "name": "bitfield_ro_nonexistent_key",
       "now_ms": 1006,
-      "argv": ["BITFIELD_RO", "no_such_bf_key", "GET", "u8", "0"],
+      "argv": [

       "expect": {
         "kind": "array",

     {

       "now_ms": 1008,
-      "argv": ["BITFIELD_RO", "bfro_signed", "GET", "i8", "0"],

         "kind": "array",
-        "value": [{ "kind": "integer", "value": -50 }]
